leads.industry: Real estate agency (villas & land for international buyers)
leads.size_hint: Boutique agency, single Canggu office, walk-in hours Mon-Fri; ASSUMPTION: ~10-25 staff
leads.why_pain: Third-party review explicitly flags slow response times during peak season and says the agency 'could benefit from a more robust client management system' to keep inquiring clients in the loop — exactly the lead-response/follow-up gap Selena sells against.
leads.evidence: https://godulu.com/review/real-estate-agents/propertia-bali/ (review noting slow peak-season response and recommending a stronger client management system); WhatsApp contact +62 818 0888 7711 published on https://propertia.com/contact-propertia-bali-real-estate/
leads.outreach_angle: AI lead-response agent that answers every WhatsApp/web inquiry in under 60 seconds during peak season, qualifies budget/area, and books viewings into agents' calendars — turning the documented slow-response complaint into a selling point.
leads.personalization: Reference the public Godulu review that praises their legal support but flags peak-season response lag; position the fix as protecting an otherwise strong reputation.

leads.industry: Real estate agency & developer (luxury villas, land)
leads.size_hint: 1,000-1,500+ active listings, 3 offices, in-house lawyers and notaries; established 2009
leads.why_pain: Enormous listing volume (1,500+ villas) means huge inbound inquiry flow across web, Instagram, and WhatsApp; keeping listing content, follow-up sequences, and agent routing current at that scale is manual-labor heavy.
leads.evidence: https://www.villabalisale.com/ and https://www.villabalisale.com/our-story (1000+ listings, 3 offices, operating since 2009)
leads.contact_channel: Website contact form and phone/WhatsApp published on villabalisale.com
leads.outreach_angle: Listing-content automation (auto-generated descriptions, translations, portal syndication for 1,500+ listings) plus AI inquiry triage that routes buyers to the right agent instantly.
leads.personalization: Cite their 16-year track record and 1,500+ listing inventory; ask how many inquiries per listing go unanswered during high season across their 3 offices.

leads.size_hint: Portfolio of 7,000+ properties since 2009; licensed SIUP-P4 agency; ASSUMPTION: 20-40 staff
leads.why_pain: One of the highest listing volumes in Canggu with a 'fill out the form and we'll get back to you' inbound model — classic delayed first-response funnel for international buyers in other time zones.
leads.evidence: https://bali-home-immo.com/ and https://bali-home-immo.com/company-presentation (13+ years, 7,000+ property portfolio); balidoneright.com round-up notes the 7,000+ portfolio
leads.contact_channel: Contact form at bali-home-immo.com/contact; office at Jl. Subak Sari No.2c, Berawa, Canggu
leads.outreach_angle: 24/7 AI first-responder for form and WhatsApp leads (buyers inquire from Europe/Australia overnight), plus CRM follow-up automation so no lead older than 5 minutes goes untouched.
leads.personalization: Note they were one of the first agencies in Canggu (2009) and that a 7,000-property portfolio deserves better than a 'we will get back to you shortly' form experience.

leads.industry: Property sales agency, villa rentals & property management
leads.size_hint: Head office over 2 floors in Berawa; founded 2018; multiple open roles; ASSUMPTION: 30-60 staff
leads.why_pain: Actively hiring 'Direct Reservation Sales' whose job description is literally managing guest inquiries and converting leads into bookings across channels, plus 'Property Management Sales' for lead generation — they are throwing headcount at a lead-response problem AI can absorb.
leads.evidence: https://betterplace.cc/careers (Direct Reservation Sales and Property Management Sales openings; role described as managing inquiries and converting leads); also listed on https://www.hhrmabali.com/company/betterplace-property/
leads.decision_maker_role: Founder/CEO (Mark Ostrovsky per public LinkedIn) or Head of Sales
leads.contact_channel: Contact form on betterplace.cc; company LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/thebetterplace
leads.outreach_angle: Before hiring another reservation-sales seat, deploy an AI inquiry agent that handles first response, qualification, and viewing/booking scheduling — one $5-10k build vs. a recurring salary.
leads.personalization: Reference their self-described 'IT-backed approach' to property management and their live Direct Reservation Sales vacancy — they already believe in tech, this is the next step.

leads.industry: Real estate agency (sales, rentals, property management)
leads.size_hint: Founded 2012; small mixed local/international agent team; ASSUMPTION: 10-25 staff
leads.why_pain: Public 'Work With Us' recruiting page seeking roles coordinating clients, viewings and admin — hiring for exactly the coordination/admin workload that CRM and follow-up automation removes; full-service scope (sales + rentals + PM) stretches a small team.
leads.evidence: https://www.balitreasureproperties.com/work-with-us (hiring page for client/viewing/admin coordination roles); team page https://balitreasureproperties.com/meet-the-team/
leads.outreach_angle: Automate viewing scheduling, inquiry qualification, and tenant/buyer follow-up so the existing team scales without the admin hire they are advertising for.
leads.personalization: Mention their 2012-founded, personalized-service positioning and their current admin/coordination vacancy; frame automation as protecting the personal touch at higher volume.

leads.location: Seminyak, Bali (covering Canggu, Ubud, Sanur, Uluwatu)
leads.industry: Real estate agency (villas, land, premium listings)
leads.size_hint: 400+ listings, ~200 villas sold since 2017, multilingual team (EN/FR/ES/IT/AR/ID), manages 70+ properties
leads.why_pain: 400+ listings and six client languages handled by a boutique team; has a public career page (recruiting), and multilingual inquiry handling is a prime automation use case.
leads.evidence: https://baliexception.com/about-us/ and https://balirate.com/en/agencies/bali-exception/ (400+ listings, multilingual team, founded 2017); hiring page https://baliexception.com/career/
leads.outreach_angle: Multilingual AI lead-response agent that answers buyer inquiries in French, Spanish, Italian, Arabic and English instantly, then hands qualified leads to the right native-speaking agent.
leads.personalization: Lead with their six-language positioning: an AI agent keeps that multilingual promise 24/7 even when the one French or Arabic speaker on the team is at a viewing.

leads.industry: Real estate agency / buy-side advisory (land, villas, off-plan for foreign investors)
leads.size_hint: Founder-led (Alberto + AREBI-licensed co-founder Sofia), operating since 2020; ASSUMPTION: under 15 staff
leads.why_pain: End-to-end concierge model (sourcing, legal verification, notarial management, rental licensing) run by a tiny founder-led team — every hour spent on unqualified inquiries is an hour off high-value deal work.
leads.evidence: https://www.thebalihomes.com/about (founder story, AREBI SIU-P4 licensed, end-to-end model, works mostly with foreign investors)
leads.contact_channel: Website contact form / inquiry flow at thebalihomes.com
leads.outreach_angle: AI qualification layer that filters tire-kickers from serious foreign investors (budget, structure, timeline) before a founder ever gets on a call; automated follow-up nurtures the rest.
leads.personalization: They say repeat clients are 'the only metric they care about' — pitch automation as freeing founder time for existing clients while no new lead slips.

leads.location: Uluwatu (projects also in Canggu, Seminyak, Cemagi, Ubud)
leads.industry: Property developer + realty arm (off-plan villas from ~$199K)
leads.size_hint: 160+ internal professionals; 200+ villas built; multiple concurrent developments (Nara, Solas, Casa Uluwatu)
leads.why_pain: Launches sell out in under a week ('previous development sold out in 7 days') — huge inquiry spikes at each launch that a human sales team cannot answer fast enough; losing slow-responded leads to competing developments.
leads.evidence: https://www.balitecture.com/news/nara-villas-launch-2026 and https://www.balitecture.com/developments/solas-uluwatu (sell-out speed, launch cadence); https://www.balitecture.com/ (160+ team, 200+ villas)
leads.contact_channel: Contact forms on balitecture.com and balitecturerealty.com
leads.outreach_angle: Launch-day AI sales agent: handles the inquiry surge for each new development, sends unit availability and payment plans instantly, and books calls for closers — capturing buyers who would otherwise go cold in the queue.
leads.personalization: Reference Nara Villas launching after Solas sold out in days; ask what percentage of launch-week inquiries got a response within an hour.

leads.industry: Property developer & investment firm (off-plan villas, PT PMA setup)
leads.size_hint: Three active off-plan developments in the Canggu corridor; ASSUMPTION: small team under 20
leads.why_pain: WhatsApp-first sales motion ('WHATSAPP US' CTA on site) with a small team selling three concurrent developments to overseas investors across time zones — manual WhatsApp follow-up is the bottleneck.
leads.evidence: https://investlandbali.com/contact/ (WhatsApp CTA, free consultation booking); https://investlandbali.com/developments/ (three active off-plan projects); https://investlandbali.com/off-plan-properties-in-bali/
leads.contact_channel: WhatsApp CTA on investlandbali.com/contact/; phone +372 56-832-434 listed publicly
leads.outreach_angle: AI WhatsApp agent that answers off-plan investor questions (payment stages, leasehold vs PT PMA, ROI projections) instantly and books consultations, running 24/7 for European/Australian buyer time zones.
leads.personalization: Their content targets data-driven investors (ROI guides, cost breakdowns) — pitch an AI agent trained on their own guides so every WhatsApp inquiry gets that same depth immediately.

leads.location: Seminyak, Bali (covering Canggu, Umalas, Uluwatu, Jimbaran)
leads.industry: Real estate agency & villa management (sales + 250+ long-term rental villas)
leads.size_hint: Family-run team; 250+ inspected rental villas plus sales listings; expanding into development
leads.why_pain: Runs sales, long-term rentals, and villa maintenance simultaneously with a family-scale team, and is publicly expanding into housing development — operational load is growing faster than headcount.
leads.evidence: https://balicoconutliving.com/about/who-we-are and https://balicoconutliving.com/ (250+ villas, family team, expansion plans into development in Canggu/Mengwi/south Bali)
leads.contact_channel: Contact form and phone/WhatsApp on balicoconutliving.com
leads.outreach_angle: CRM + follow-up automation that keeps rental renewals, owner communications, and sales inquiries all moving without adding staff as they expand into development.
leads.personalization: Reference their stated expansion into the development market — automation as the way to enter development without dropping the ball on 250+ managed rentals.

leads.industry: Developer-owned real estate agency (turnkey & off-plan villas)
leads.size_hint: Agency established 2023 under iLot (developer with 27 years experience); mixed local/expat agent team; claims 2,000+ international clients
leads.why_pain: Young agency scaling fast on international buyer volume across multiple own-brand developments (MOA, Babakan, Umalas villas); early-stage ops mean processes are still manual. ASSUMPTION: no mature CRM/automation stack given agency founded 2023.
leads.evidence: https://balivillarealty.com/about/ and https://ilotpropertybali.com/about/ (established 2023, developer-backed, 2,000+ international clients claim)
leads.contact_channel: Contact forms on balivillarealty.com and ilotpropertybali.com
leads.outreach_angle: Stand up the lead-response and CRM automation layer now, while the agency is young — instant follow-up on every portal/Instagram/WhatsApp lead across both the realty and developer brands.
leads.personalization: Note the two-brand structure (iLot developments + Bali Villa Realty agency) and offer one unified AI lead-routing layer across both.

leads.industry: Real estate agency (villas, land; 250+ villa listings)
leads.size_hint: 10+ years operating; English-speaking agent team; 250+ active villa listings
leads.why_pain: High listing count marketed hard on price-led SEO pages ('250 Bali Villas fr US $95,000') implies heavy top-of-funnel inquiry volume with wide quality variance — qualification burden on human agents. ASSUMPTION on inquiry volume.
leads.contact_channel: Contact form and phone on balirealty.com
leads.outreach_angle: AI qualification bot for their high-volume, low-price-entry funnel: separates $95K browsers from $1M+ buyers automatically and routes each to the right agent or nurture sequence.
leads.personalization: Their SEO strategy pulls in bargain hunters and serious buyers alike — pitch automation as the filter that makes cheap-lead SEO actually profitable.

leads.industry: Real estate agency (villas, land; local + international clients; global franchise)
leads.size_hint: Local franchise office of Harcourts (900 offices / 9 countries network); ASSUMPTION: 10-30 local staff
leads.why_pain: Publishes WhatsApp (+62 878 6273 1018) as a primary sales channel while serving a global referral network — international time-zone inquiries hitting a single local WhatsApp line means queue and follow-up gaps. ASSUMPTION on response gaps.
leads.evidence: Search-verified contact details: WhatsApp +62 878 6273 1018, phone (0361) 9091299, address Jl. Pemelisan Agung No.22, Tibubeneng (via harcourtspurbabali.com)
leads.outreach_angle: AI WhatsApp concierge that gives franchise-grade instant response 24/7, feeding qualified leads into their pipeline and matching the Harcourts global brand standard.
leads.personalization: Contrast the global Harcourts brand promise with the reality of a single Bali WhatsApp line handling worldwide buyer inquiries overnight.

leads.industry: Real estate agency (land & villas, freehold/leasehold; in-house legal)
leads.size_hint: 10+ years operating; multilingual staff; in-house legal department; ASSUMPTION: 10-20 staff
leads.why_pain: Area-dominant Ubud specialist doing due diligence in-house before listing — expert time is scarce, yet inquiries from wellness-expat buyers arrive around the clock; runs its own custom 'Ubud Core System' portal suggesting appetite for tooling but likely no AI layer. ASSUMPTION on AI gap.
leads.evidence: https://www.ubudproperty.com/about_us (licensed, multilingual, in-house legal, decade+ operating); https://ucoms.ubudproperty.com/login (own core system)
leads.contact_channel: Contact details and forms on ubudproperty.com
leads.outreach_angle: Plug an AI inquiry-and-follow-up agent into their existing UCOMS workflow: instant answers on leasehold vs freehold FAQs, land-zoning basics, and viewing bookings before human experts step in.
leads.personalization: Acknowledge they already built their own core system (UCOMS) — position Selena as adding the AI front door to infrastructure they clearly value.

leads.industry: Real estate agency (Sanur villa sales, yearly rentals, land, property management)
leads.size_hint: Family-run (founders Widi and Tom); single Sanur office; ASSUMPTION: under 10 staff
leads.why_pain: Tiny family team covering four service lines (sales, rentals, PM, consultancy) in a retiree/family-heavy expat market — owner-founders personally handle correspondence, so response and follow-up capacity is structurally capped.
leads.evidence: https://www.balimoves.com/about-us/ (family-run, founders Widi and Tom, full service scope, Sanur-focused)
leads.contact_channel: Contact form and phone on balimoves.com; office Jl Danau Tamblingan 51, Sanur
leads.outreach_angle: Right-sized automation for a family agency: AI handles rental inquiry triage and owner updates so the founders spend their time on Sanur sales deals, not inbox management.
leads.personalization: Lean on their 'Sanur's local agency' identity — automation keeps the personal, local feel while covering nights and weekends when European buyers write in.

leads.location: Canggu (Berawa) HQ; projects in Uluwatu/Bingin, Nusa Penida and island-wide
leads.industry: Property developer (luxury villas, residences, resorts; 17 active developments)
leads.size_hint: Operating since 2005; 17 active developments, 1,000+ units under construction, >$1.8B assets claimed
leads.why_pain: Selling 1,000+ off-plan units (e.g., 106-unit Amali Residence, Uluwatu) to international buyers generates massive multi-project inquiry flow; sales teams juggling per-project WhatsApp lines and brokers means follow-up leakage. ASSUMPTION on leakage.
leads.evidence: https://mirahdevelopments.com/about-mirah/ and https://www.edgeprop.sg/property-news/luxury-holiday-homes-and-villas-bali-mirah-investment-development (17 developments, 1,000+ units, Amali Uluwatu); public phone +62 813-3788-2005
leads.outreach_angle: Per-project AI sales assistants that answer unit availability, payment schedules and ownership-structure questions instantly across all 17 developments, with unified CRM handoff to human closers.
leads.personalization: Reference the Amali Luxury Residence launch coverage in Singapore press — international demand at that scale deserves sub-minute response in every time zone.
